title: erodium cicutarium f. pimpinellifolium
intro: Erodium cicutarium f. pimpinellifolium, also known as Red-stemmed Stork's-bill, is a plant species in the geranium family that is characterized by its pink or white flowers and reddish stems. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Erodium cicutarium f. pimpinellifolium include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional.
